title: All code should be reachable
description: ensures that all code can be reached during execution, making it easier to maintain and test the code.
message: All functions, classes, and modules should be reachable.
recommendation: Review and ensure all code is reachable.

noncompliant.code:
def unused_function(): pass

def main(): pass
noncompliant.description: An unused function that is not called.

compliant.code:
def unused_function(): pass

def main(): unused_function()
compliant.description: An unused function that is called in main.

why_is_this_an_issue: Unreachable code can make it difficult to maintain and test the code.
how_to_fix: Review and remove or make unreachable code unnecessary.
